01 — Logo & Mark
Three versions.
One mark.
Dark Logo — Light BG
White Logo — Dark BG
Gradient Logo
White Logo — Gradient BG
✓ Do

Use the gradient logo as the hero mark. Use white on dark surfaces. Use black/dark on cream and light surfaces. Maintain generous clear space around the mark — at minimum equal to the mark’s height × 0.25 on all sides.

✕ Don’t

Never stretch, rotate, recolor, or add effects (drop shadows, glows, outlines) to the logo. Never place on busy photographic backgrounds without an overlay. Never use the gradient version at sizes below 80px wide.

02 — Typography
Two typefaces.
One voice.
Display — Norwige
Aa
font-family: 'Norwige', Georgia, serif — Weight 400 / 700
Body — Roboto
Warm, grounded, refined. Your brand speaks with quiet authority — expert without being cold.
font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif — Weight 300 / 400 / 500
Display Brand Identity Norwige 700 / 52px
H1 Section Heading Norwige 700 / 36px
H2 Subheading Text Norwige 400 / 26px
Body Regular body copy for paragraphs and descriptions, clear and easy to read at length. Roboto 300 / 16px
Label Category Tag · Label Roboto 500 / 10px / 0.18em
Caption Supporting metadata or caption text, used sparingly. Roboto 300 / 12px

Earth, warmth,
& ember.

Click to copy
Ember
#90422C
Accent / CTA

Primary Surfaces

Deep Brown (#3B2114) anchors all dark compositions as the primary background. Dark Brown (#603E25) creates mid-level depth for strips, cards, and secondary sections. Never use more than two dark tones together without a light separator.

Accent & Highlights

Ember (#90422C) is your sole accent — reserve it for CTAs, active states, labels, and emphasis. Cream (#FFF4E3) is the primary text and light-surface color. The mid-tones (Tan, Sand) layer depth into UI and supporting elements.

06 — Brand Voice
How you
sound.
Pillar 01
Grounded
Substance over noise. Every word earns its place. Your audience feels the weight of experience behind each sentence — never hollow, always intentional.
Pillar 02
Warm
Expert without being cold. Like a trusted advisor who makes complex things feel human and approachable. Authority with empathy.
Pillar 03
Refined
Quiet confidence. No overselling, no hype. The work speaks for itself — your voice simply frames it with precision and calm elegance.
✓ Write Like This

Crafted for those who value the details. Our process is methodical — every step considered, every outcome earned. We don’t rush quality.

✕ Not Like This

AMAZING RESULTS GUARANTEED!! We’re the BEST — our clients LOVE us! Don’t miss this INCREDIBLE opportunity! 🔥🔥🔥
